allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\(''typescript''\); const src = ts.createSourceFile\(''women.ts'', require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''content/women.ts'', ''utf8''\), ts.ScriptTarget.Latest, true\); let errors = 0; function check\(node\) { if \(node.kind === ts.SyntaxKind.Unknown\) errors++; ts.forEachChild\(node, check\); } check\(src\); console.log\(''Parse errors:'', src.parseDiagnostics ? src.parseDiagnostics.length : ''n/a''\); console.log\(''File lines:'', src.text.split\(\\''\\n\\''\).length\);")
